caption: The video shows a close-up view of a car's digital instrument cluster. The display features a speedometer or tachometer on the left with red markings and numeric values including 4500 and 5500. In the center of the screen, white text reads "BRAKE", followed by a red icon, and then "Press Brake and Push Button to Start". Below this instruction, the mileage "20434 mi" is displayed. No people or other equipment are visible in the scene. Across the sequence of frames, the view shifts slightly, with the camera panning from left to right. This movement causes the red gauge on the left to slide partially out of view while revealing more of the dark dashboard paneling on the right side of the screen. The on-screen text and mileage remain static throughout the clip.
